features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
REMOVES THE TOUGHEST STAINS: The Elbow Grease Stain Remover Bar will remove stubborn stains from all types of fabric & clothing
BLEACH FREE: The Elbow Grease Stain Remover Bar contains enzymes to remove stubborn stains from fabrics.
PRE WASH: The Elbow Grease Stain Remover Bar removes stains during the wash cycle, simply rub shirt collars and other everyday stains on fabrics and place on the usual wash cycle.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Pack of 1 Bar
Unit count: 100.0; Unit count type: gram; Ingredients: Stain bar
description: Product Description This new Elbow Grease Stain Remover bar removes stubborn stains from your laundry, simply rub shirt collars and other everyday stains on fabrics and place on the usual wash cycle. This Stain Remover Bar, is another miracle product from Elbow Grease with thousands of positive reviews and happy customers worldwide. Pack of 1 Ingredients Stain bar
